title: Announcements
content:
Announcements

International Registered Students

Announcements

Submission of Residence Permit Copies

08
						December

2025

Dear Students,

We would like to remind you to submit your current/renewed residence permits front and back to us as soon as possible so we can update your systems. You can scan it to below email address:

international-students@okan.edu.tr

Otherwise you will not be able to take any document from the university. In addition, you will not be seen as an active student in the government system, and your registration can be canceled according to Higher Education Council rules.

Best Regards

International Students Office

en

tr
